Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}Do you remember Chidori, the girl who was with Strega?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}The truth is... there's a chance that she may wake up today.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}I know what you're going to say. And yes, we did see her die with our own eyes.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}However... a few days later, her body began to undergo transmogrification.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}For the past few weeks, she's been in a sort of stasis, neither living nor dead.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}It may be related to her Persona's abilities, but that's mere speculation.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Honestly... I didn't know if I should.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}There was a chance I could've made things worse without knowing whether she would live or die.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}The reason I wanted to talk to you is... How do you think we should tell Iori?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}It's hard to believe, but it seems that Chidori really has come back to life—[cr][n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 3 4 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 23 0 0}Huh...? I-Is this a joke? Some kinda trick...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}No... It's not a joke, or a trick. She's currently recovering in the same hospital as before.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 3 1 1 0 0 29 0 0}Wha— Hey, Junpei! What about your cleanup duty!?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 6 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 31 0 0}Well, I guess it's a moot point now...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}But... perhaps it's for the best that he found out this way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 2 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}I think I'll head to the hospital after this, too. Could I ask you to come along?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}We all decided to go to Tatsumi[n]Memorial Hospital together.[n]{f 1 1}
